title: Post Release Sounds
description: This resource pack brings the classic Minecraft sounds from 1.0 to 1.6
body: This resource pack was made in order to bring the classic Minecraft sounds from 1.0 to 1.6. These versions used to have a specific mix of sounds that lack in current or previous versions. I made this resource pack for people who were used to these old sounds and would like to have them back.
